Our Story

Born in Rajasthan.
Worn Everywhere.

I am Bhumika Ranawat. I don't trend-chase. I curate.

I grew up around this jewelry — in the markets, the weddings, the everyday rituals of Rajasthan. I know what authentic looks like. And I know what doesn't make the cut.
